steps.title: Eliminate to find x
steps.content:
Subtract the second equation from the first equation.
$$(\frac{5}{4}x+2y)-(\frac{3}{4}x+2y)=28-24$$
$$\frac{1}{2}x=4$$
$$x=8$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Use $x=8$ and $y=9$ in the requested expression.
$$\frac{11}{4}(8)+6(9)=22+54=76$$
The answer is D.
